session.user:

1. pytest tests/unit/review/test_prompt_assembly.py -x -v 2. pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_get_review_activity_log.py -x -v 3. pytest tests/unit/fakes/test_fake_github.py -x -v -k "get_pr_comment_body_by_marker"
Run them sequentially (each after the previous completes) and report all results.
